/usr/bin/ar qc libdbms_core.a CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/core/string_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/core/value.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/core/row.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/core/table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/core/database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/core/catalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/core/btree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/core/journal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/core/persistence.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/sql/lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/sql/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/sql/ast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/sql/where_eval.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/exec/executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/net/protocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/auth/crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/auth/jwt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/auth/rbac.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/server/job_queue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/server/telemetry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbms_core.dir/src/server/access_log.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libdbms_core.a
